title: Iron Repair Kits
description: A better way to repair your items.
body:
![Repair Kits](https://i.imgur.com/HnV1B7J.png)
Introducing Repair Kits - your solution to keeping your tools and weapons durability, compatible with other mods

Currently, the mod offers 6 tiers of kits.

- Works on versions from 1.16.5-1.20.4 although some versions won't receive future updates
- In the recent update (2.1), the mod's mechanic has been remade to a GUI making the fabric port currently unavailable for the 2.1 version, to be clear an older version can be used but it has quite a lot of issues.


## Not compatible with:
- Currently, there are no known incompatibilities

## Changelog: 2.2
- Brand new Gui
- Bug Fixes
  
**Highly recommended to be used with modded items or QQL mods (Simply Swords, Just Enough Items, etc)**

![How to](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZmQ2bzRtZXd5d3dwcTVhNXc3Yjd3eDMwYTdoeW5meWlrN3pid2kzNiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/6yzHPl3n5E6VYFFKWG/giphy.gif)

![Kits](https://i.imgur.com/pumUODh.png)
